error_signature: need to reload the page to see updated votes
title: Votes not updating without page reload
symptom: Users must reload the page to see their vote reflected in the vote count. This leads to a poor user experience.
not_this_if: Votes update automatically without page reload
root_cause: The front end does not automatically refresh the displayed vote count after a user votes. This is likely due to the static nature of the collection and the lack of a mechanism to fetch updated data post-vote.
fix_steps: Add a Fetch collection action at the end of the voting workflow
Configure it to fetch the updated dynamic collection from Supabase
Test the workflow to ensure the vote count updates without a page reload
agent_instruction: Implement a Fetch collection action in the workflow to update the vote count dynamically.
